reviews.review_description: Paid for it, spent a ridiculous amount of time down loading the game and it doesn't play. I've restarted the headset. Used a different wifi. No joy. This is a waste. I have a range of songs on my headset. I have given permissions to the app/game. Still does not work. Would like a full refund please

developer_response.body:
Hi! I'm really sorry you're having trouble with the game.

Based on your description, it sounds like there might be a setup or configuration issue rather than a problem with the game itself. BeatsPunch requires access to your local music files and proper permissions in order to load songs correctly.

Please make sure that:

The app has permission to access your device storage.

Your music files are placed in a supported folder.

The files are in a supported format (such as MP3 or WAV).

Many users with large music libraries are able to run the game without issues, so it's very likely something small in the setup process. If you'd like, I'd be happy to help you troubleshoot and get everything working.

Feel free to reach out and we can solve it together. Thanks for giving the game a try!

reviews.review_description: Like the new environments and gameplay is even better.  Great job!
Down loaded it but will not play. It is stuck on where you accept or reject terms. 🙃. I wish I could get it to work!

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you're having trouble enjoying the game😣 Please reach out to us at support@vendarisdev.com so we can assist you as soon as possible and ensure you have the best experience.

reviews.review_description: Downloaded it and tried to open. It shows a very pixely screen and then it just closes.

developer_response.body: Please send us an email at support@vendarisdev.com and we’ll help you resolve your issue as soon as possible. You can also check on your own that all the necessary permissions are properly enabled in your device settings. Since this is a rhythm game that reads songs from your device, the app requires several permissions to function correctly.

reviews.review_description: I like this one, a lot, it could use some graphics updates but it really gives you a good arms workout - well done!

developer_response.body: We hope you enjoy the new update featuring improved graphics.

reviews.review_description: It will not let me play more than one song. It keeps saying to set my weight, but the number pad does not work to enter my weight. How do I fix this?
New game similar to the other rhyming fitness apps but different exciting music and being able to play while listening to your music of choice is a huge bonus.

I bought this today after seeing the brilliant reviews but so far I can’t see what the hype is as after I play one game on easy mode I can’t play a game straight after as it doesn’t reload I’ve got to quit the game 2-3 times until I can play again. I will give a review in about a weeks time hopefully it’ll be a better one. Can anyone tell me why I can’t play a game straight after playing again without quitting the game to open the game again to play?  It’s says you can keep a record of your calories on an app on android. Does anyone know what the app is & where available Thanks Liz

As the title says, you can have a nice chunk of time working out with this app because of it’s feature that you can add any music track and automatically makes you the map and it’s beats. I really enjoy it and will be expending more time on it!

Great for fun or exercise. Wonderful graphics. Different backgrounds. Custom music. I liked playing each if the 5 levels from easy which was slower up to god mode which went much quicker.  Bonus, it keeps track of calories burned!

Songs included are amazing, love being able to select my background and other options. Really love the option to add your own songs wow the possibilities of this game are endless! Graphics are fantastic!
Great upper body workout, just needs to raise the intensity/frequency so I can break out a sweat.
A good looking game. The balls could do with being a little faster. Fun to play though.
friendly game! easy to play and good exercise

I really enjoy the workout I get with this app. It definitely gets you moving and has several modes to choose from. I love that you can do a good fast paced cardio workout and end with a great cool down session.
